'''Kavil's Corsairs''' were a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pirate/Legends|privateers]] operating in the months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. They were based on [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]] and maintained a fleet of [[Ugly/Legends|ugly]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] including [[TYE-wing]]s and [[Z-'ceptor]]s, a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing]], and at least one [[flight cruiser]] decorated with the [[Blazing Claw/Legends|Blazing Claw]]. Their other targets included [[Edusa]] and [[Vandyne]].

[[File:Kavil_Corsairs_TIE-wings.jpg|thumb|left|300px|A Kavil's Corsairs starfighter squadron]]
They were led by [[Kavil]], who was tempted by the possibility of social elevation in the Empire through his duties. The pirates sustained losses in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Raid on pirates|raid]].

After being driven off of [[Eiattu 6]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]] joined with Kavil's Corsairs. She intended to overthrow Kavil with support from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and to this end kidnapped [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and "[[Winter Celchu|Leia Organa]]." Presumably the Corsairs later became part of her [[Invids]] organization.
